key.name: first-change-window
key.summary: Focus the second window when switching
key.description: When the switcher is opened, the second window is focused by default, similar to the original Unity behavior.

key.name: hover-shade-level
key.description: The brightness multiplier for the hover glow (e.g., 0.1 means 10% brighter).

key.name: hover-border-width
key.description: The thickness of the border around the hovered item in pixels.

key.name: hover-glow-size
key.description: The size of the inner glow (box-shadow) for the hovered item.

key.name: hover-opacity
key.description: The opacity of the hover highlight (0.0 to 1.0).

key.name: icon-spacing
key.description: The distance between icons in pixels.

key.name: container-padding
key.description: The padding around the icons inside the switcher.

key.name: background-color
key.description: The background color of the switcher (CSS format).

key.name: border-size
key.description: The thickness of the switcher border.

key.name: border-color
key.description: The color of the switcher border (CSS format).

key.name: background-border-radius
key.description: The border radius of the main switcher container in pixels.

key.name: icon-border-radius
key.description: The border radius of the application icons in pixels.
